query: SELECT sw.id, sw.title, sw.reminderSent, sw.reminderSentAt, sw.createdBy, u.name as createdByName FROM scheduled_webinars sw LEFT JOIN users u ON sw.createdBy = u.id WHERE sw.reminderSent = 1 ORDER BY sw.reminderSentAt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT sw.id, sw.title, sw.reminderSent, sw.reminderSentAt, sw.createdBy, u.name as createdByName FROM scheduled_webinars sw LEFT JOIN users u ON sw.createdBy = u.id WHERE sw.reminderSent = 1 ORDER BY sw.reminderSentAt DESC;
